nasb.text: and the water receded steadily from the earth, and at the end of one hundred and fifty days the water decreased.

esv.text: and the waters receded from the earth continually. At the end of 150 days the waters had abated,

cnv.text: 水從地上不斷退去，過了一百五十天，水就消退了。

ccb.text: 地上的洪水慢慢消退，过了一百五十天，水退下去了。

csbs.text: 水从地上渐渐回落；过了一百五十天，水就大大减退了。
